arts.ttl: Stoke City vs Leeds United live - Team news from bet365 Stadium - Stoke-on-Trent Live
arts.sum: Hello from the bet365 Stadium as Stoke City take on Leeds United in the Championship. We will have all the news, action and reaction as it happens from the bet365 Stadium.

arts.ttl: Brand new Leeds United reveal is great news for Daniel Farke going into 2025
arts.sum: Revealed: Leeds top majority of Championship stats, not goals conceded though Leeds United are looking to head into 2025 sitting in the top two of the Championship as they do right now, and virtually every major stat has them as the best in the division right now.

arts.ttl: Leeds United transfer options as potential avenue opens despite Daniel Farke's stance
arts.sum: It's more than likely Leeds will operate in the same way this forthcoming transfer window with the club being careful with regards to what they spend, while Farke doesn't want to disrupt his squad too much. Michael Smith (33, centre-forward, Sheffield Wednesday)

arts.ttl: Two-word review of Jack Harrison does not bode well for Leeds United sale
arts.sum: Jack Harrison is having a simply torrid time of it during his second loan spell away from Leeds United at Everton, and the Toffees faithful have had enough. Harrison’s time at Goodison Park in this second season isn’t going how he’d have hoped, actually seeing his stock plummet with every performance.

arts.ttl: Stoke City have Leeds United mission with 'fight' message sent
arts.sum: "I’m looking forward to it, all the players ready for the next game, the next battle, and we know it’s an important one at home against a top, top team but always with the idea to compete and to win," Pelach said. Stoke City manager Narcis Pelach is well aware of the dangers Leeds United will pose in this evening's Boxing Day clash, but has demanded his players match their competitive levels on the pitch.

arts.ttl: Brenden Aaronson's brave personal prediction as Leeds United star explains Championship transition
arts.sum: Brenden Aaronson believes that now is ' just the starting point' as he continues to impress as Leeds United push for promotion to the Premier League. "I am someone that puts a lot of pressure on myself," Aaronson said.

arts.ttl: Leeds United face transfer competition for cut-price Swiss hot prospect
arts.sum: Get Leeds United news to your phone with our WhatsApp community Leeds United will have to pull out all the stops to land January transfer target Alvyn Sanches - with the youngster reportedly set for a move in 2025.

arts.ttl: Sheff Utd, Burnley should be very scared if Leeds United build on new “bright spark”
arts.sum: Leeds United winger Manor Solomon was the star of the show when the Whites cruised past Oxford United last time out, and his performance is hopefully a sign of things to come. Having found it hard to bring a sustained level of good performances at Elland Road since joining, Farke teased the prospect of a sharper Solomon coming into this clash at home, and he was correct.

arts.ttl: Leeds United ‘serious’ about signing player – Whites offer could arrive as soon as January
arts.sum: Leeds United are keen on signing Mjällby AIF goalkeeper Noel Törnqvist in the winter market. That’s according to Fotboll Direkt, who say Leeds are showing ‘serious interest’ in the 22-year-old. The Leeds links aren’t new as they were credited with an interest in the stopper a year ago. Championship average attendance figures: Leeds rank high Elland Road has always been a ground that every fans looks forward to visiting in the calendar, and we have seen that for sure this season in the Championship.
